text.heading: RE: ESSAY COMPETITION FOR TERTIARY INSTITUTIONS TO MARK THE 2010 COMMONWEALTH DAY CELEBRATION
text.p: I write at the instance of the Executive Secretary to forward a copy of the attached self-explanatory circular from the Federal Ministry of Education on the above subject, to Vice-Chancelors of all Nigerian Universities for your attention, appropriate action and wide circulation in your respective universities.
Please accept the assurances of the Executive Secretary's high regards.
Senior Special Assistant to the Executive Secretary
